overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in a straw cape walking through a misty mountain trail that transitions into a vibrant field of purple flowers. The overcast spring day provides diffused lighting as the character explores the 'Sakura Woods' area.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with stone lanterns and rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain path, moving away from the starting position

notable_agents.action: sitting on the ground by the path wearing a conical straw hat

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with wooden frame and paper covering
large gray rock formation beside the dirt path
tall evergreen pine trees lining the mountain trail
distant mountain peaks with snow visible through the misty atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a misty mountain trail with the character walking past a stone lantern and a sitting NPC. Tall pine trees line the left side while large rock formations sit to the right, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition between rocky trail and flower meadow

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the overcast sky and tall pine tree canopy
location text 'SAKURU WOODS' appears, marking entry into the flower field area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain transitions from rocky trail to grassy meadow

entered.detail: field of vibrant purple wildflowers beginning to appear alongside the path
wooden trail marker post indicating the path direction

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to show the overcast sky before returning to the path as purple flowers begin to appear on the left. The terrain becomes more grassy and open, with a wooden signpost visible ahead marking the transition into Sakura Woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow filled with purple wildflowers and mountain backdrop

events.description: birds fly overhead through the misty sky above the flower field

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense purple flower field toward a distant wooden structure

notable_agents.action: distant figure or structure visible through the flowers ahead

entered.detail: small traditional wooden shrine or structure visible in the distance through the mist
birds circling and flying through the sky above the meadow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense field of vibrant purple flowers that now surround the path on all sides. Birds fly overhead in the misty sky as a distant wooden shrine becomes visible ahead, with snow-capped mountains forming the backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty mountain trail that gradually transforms into a vibrant, flower-filled valley. It begins with the character walking past a stone lantern and a seated figure, flanked by tall pine trees and rugged rock formations under a haze of distant, snow-capped peaks. As the camera tilts up toward the overcast sky and returns to the path, the terrain opens into grassy meadows where purple flowers first emerge beside a wooden signpost marking the entrance to Sakura Woods. The scene then expands as the character enters a dense field of vibrant purple blossoms that surround the path on all sides. Finally, birds fly overhead through the mist as the camera pushes forward toward a distant wooden shrine set against the backdrop of the towering mountains.
